subject: fix(aud): race conditions, timer leaks, ineffective memo, partial failures
body:
ResponsesPage: Fix status change race condition — read prevStatus
synchronously before the state setter instead of inside it, preventing
stale captures under concurrent status changes.

ResponsesPage: Use Promise.allSettled for loading submissions + form
definition, so a partial API failure preserves the successful response
instead of discarding both and falling back to sample data.

embedResize: Add disposed flag to guard mutation debounce timer callback
against firing after cleanup, preventing stale DOM reads on unmount.

BuilderCanvas: Pass stable Zustand store functions to SortableFieldCard
instead of inline arrow functions. Handlers are built inside the memoized
component via useCallback, making memo comparison effective during drag.

BuilderPage: Guard title edit against readOnly mode — check store state
before calling updateFormTitle to prevent silent failures.

Tags: bugfix, race-condition, memoization, timer-leak, audit
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: medium
Debt: paid
Epic: form-builder
Semver: patch
